title: Mini's Cobblemon Icons
description: Shuffle Style Cobblemon Icons for xearo's minimap that combine's my favorite features of Keice's Icons, E19' Icons, and over 1000 Custom Shiny Icons.
body:
This is my take on Shuffle style icon's for Xaero's Map in Cobblemon.

It's built based on the concepts of both Kiece's and E19's map icons!

I have made some new Icon's for the Magikarp varients of 1.6, and over 1000 custom shiny icons, with hopefully more to come!

To install, place the Zip folder into your resourcepacks folder, and enable the pack in game!
